_comment_enabled: set true after: VIPS daemon running+synced, address/rpc credentials filled in
_comment_BTCover17: If BTC 0.17 or higher, payment does not work please enable it
_comment_address: use a legacy base58 'V...' address (not bech32) owned by the daemon wallet

paymentProcessing._comment_minConf: VIPS COINBASE_MATURITY is 500; keep a small margin
paymentProcessing._comment_pps: paymentMode=pps only (share-based; the pool fronts block-find variance from a pre-funded float - see docs/payment-schemes.md). blockReward = current block subsidy in coins (0 DISABLES accrual; set it from your daemon's getblocktemplate coinbasevalue or getblocksubsidy); minFloat = kill-switch float floor, operator-tunable; feePercent = pool cut taken off each share; accrualInterval = seconds (min 10).
paymentProcessing._comment_dpps: paymentMode=dpps only (dynamic PPS; the per-share rate auto-throttles on the pool's realized luck, floored at rateMin and capped at full PPS - see docs/payment-schemes.md section 5). blockReward as in pps; targetMargin = solvency cushion taken off the rate (0.02 = 2%); rateMin = floor on the per-share rate vs full PPS; smoothingWindow = accrual cycles over which realized luck is EMA-smoothed; minFloat / accrualInterval as in pps.

_comment_poolId: use it for region identification: eu, us, asia or keep default if you have one stratum instance for one coin
